stemHtml: Radio signals are attenuated as they pass through the troposphere. Assuming they are transmitted at the same strength, which of the following VHF signals is likely to suffer least attenuation?

options.a: An air-to-ground message from an aircraft flying at 30 000 feet.
options.b: An air-to-air communication between two aircraft flying at 10 000 feet.
options.c: A ground-to-air message to an aircraft flying at 30 000 feet.
options.d: An air-to-air communication between two aircraft flying at 30 000 feet.
